rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint Without Any Page Limitations Or Restrictions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF TYRONE ADAMS Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint Without Any Page Limitations Or Restrictions is DENIED. Plaintiff has thirty days to file a First Amended Complaint following the Court's ruling sustaining Defendants' Demurrer with leave to amend. Plaintiff should refer to CRC 2.100 et seq. and Local Rule 2.7 for filing requirements. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss The Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Mark S. Dove N Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT BRUCE BUTTACAVOLI, BUTTACAVOLI INDUSTRIES, INC. Motion To Dismiss The Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to bring this action to trial as to Defendants Bruce Buttacavoli and Bruce Buttacavoli Industries Inc. within five years pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 583.310.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 1. Defendant'S Demurrer To Complaint s SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff must individually plead each cause of action and allege sufficient facts to state a cause of action. Defendants raise persuasive arguments that this matter is barred by res judicata. Plaintiff has thirty days to re-draft and file a First Amended Complaint.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAMIR HINN ET AL VS. DIANA TOM SHARE TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 4. Motion To Strike Complaint is DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAMIR HINN ET AL VS. DIANA TOM SHARE TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 4. Demurrer To Complaint is OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Joseph Hinn. Plaintiff to allege facts supporting standing as to the breach of contract causes of action and/or to allege facts in support of wrongdoing as to the tort causes of action separate and apart from the alleged breach of contract. Demurrer is otherwise overruled, sufficient facts are alleged to support unreasonable withholding of consent to assign. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA STEINOFF HOLMES VS. DANIEL FELDMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT DANIEL FELDMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XIU XUE LIAO VS. WILLIAM R CHASTAIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT WILLIAM CHASTAIN, LAICE SOUZA VALE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASMINE LEE-ELLIOTT VS. JOHN CHRISTIAN VOLDAL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT JOHN VOLDAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer, is not uncertain, and asserts relevant terms of the rental agreement. = (501/CFH)
